Document:
# Misfits: Nuclear Wasteland
Welcome to Misfits: Nuclear Wasteland.
This is a Fallout-themed SS14 fork set in a harsh, persistent Wasteland shaped by player decisions. The server uses a hybrid approach to lore, drawing inspiration from canonical Fallout sources, extended materials, and original worldbuilding to create a grounded but flexible setting.
Our focus is immersive faction conflict, survival, politics, and player-driven narrative.
## Roleplay
Misfits operates under [bold]Medium Roleplay[/bold] standards.
This means:
Roleplay quality matters.
Immersion is expected.
Character consistency is important.
Fun is still allowed.
You are not the protagonist of the Wasteland. No one is.
Every player is part of a shared, evolving story. Before making drastic decisions, consider how your actions affect the broader narrative and the experience of others.
Stay in character whenever reasonably possible. Avoid unnecessary mechanical references or immersion breaks.
## The Wasteland Philosophy
[italic]The Wasteland does not protect you.[/italic]
Consequences are real. Death, capture, political fallout, and faction retaliation are part of the intended experience. Staff will enforce rules, not rewrite outcomes.
Your reputation, alliances, and choices define your path.
## Getting Started
If you are new, we recommend reviewing the following in order:
[textlink="Server Rules" link="DefaultRuleset"]
[textlink="Factions Overview" link="Factions"]
[textlink="Survival Basics" link="N14SurvivalBasics"]
[textlink="Wiki — Full Guidebook" link="MisfitsWiki"]
Not every profession or concept currently has a guide. If you are an experienced player and wish to contribute, we welcome community-written documentation.
[italic]The Wasteland is shaped by its players. Help build it.[/italic]
